AsIs.WhereClause: cases cas, case_events ce where cas.case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The issue fee of the claim

AsIs.BriefDescription: In response to issue fee prompt
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain= 'ISSUE_FEE_179' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The issue fee of the claim

AsIs.BriefDescription: In response to issue fee prompt
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain= 'ISSUE_FEE_185' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The issue fee of the claim

AsIs.BriefDescription: In response to issue fee prompt
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ISSUE_FEE_186' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The issue fee of the claim
The notice can be served by the 'court' or the 'claimant'.
Indication of whether the particulars of the case are included. Choose Y or N.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Establishes if this output is a claim, counterclaim or both
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'CLM_CTRCLM_BOTH' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = nvl(ti.text_value,'CLM') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Allocation/Stayed eg claim or counter claim. choose from BTH (claim and counterclaim), CLM (claim) and CTR (courterclaim).

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'JUDGE_NAME' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Name of Judge.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date by which the allocation questionnaire must be filed.
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'AQ_FILE_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Allocation Questionaire file date

AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, null, null, 'No ' || vv.description || ' having been filed')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ITEM_NOT_FILED' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = nvl(ti.text_value,'ACK') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: item not filed. ACK (No Acknowledgement of service having been filed), DEF (No Defence having been filed)

Values.Value: No Acknowledgement of service having been filed

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DEFT_LIABILITY' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = nvl(ti.text_value, 'LIAB') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Defendant Liability. Choice of 2 values: 'LIAB'(The defendant having admitted liability) and 'LNAC'(The defendant having admitted liability and offered an am)

Values.Value: The defendant having admitted liability and offered an am

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_ATTENDEES' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code=id2.code and id2.domain= 'HRG_ATTENDEES_OTHER' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = NVL(ti.text_value,'1') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Attendees at hearing. Choose from values in drop down. See below

Values.Value: HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE DEFENDANT IN PERSON
HEARING THE SOLICITORS FOR BOTH PARTIES
HEARING THE CLAIMANT IN PERSON AND THE SOLICITOR FOR THE DEFENDANT
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE DEFENDANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE DEFENDANT AND THE CLAIMANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE SOLICITOR FOR THE DEFENDANT
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE DEFENDANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT AND THE CLAIMANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING THE CLAIMANT IN PERSON AND COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT
HEARING THE CLAIMANT IN PERSON AND THE DEFENDANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE CLAIMANT AND THE DEFENDANT IN PERSON
HEARING THE DEFENDANT IN PERSON AND THE CLAIMANT NOT ATTENDING

THE COURTS OWN MOTION. THE COURT HAS MADE THIS ORDER OF ITS OWN INITIATIVE WITHOUT A HEARING. IF YOU OBJECT TO THE ORDER, YOU MUST MAKE AN APPLICATION TO HAVE IT SET ASIDE, VARIED OR STAYED WITHIN 7 DAYS OF RECEIVING IT

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_ATTENDEES' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code=id2.code and id2.domain= 'HRG_ATTENDEES_OTHER' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = NVL(ti.text_value,'1') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date by which Questionnaire should be returned
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'QUSTNR_RETURN_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq= P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Listing Questionaire return date. Format: dd-mmm-yyyy

XslVariable.name: vdOrderDate
XslVariable.ExtraInfo: This is no longer required. This has been confirmed by Kathrin Miles.

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ORDER_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Details of the Process not served
AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, 'APP', ' for '|| lower(ti2.text_value), 'ORD', ' of ' || to_char(to_date(ti3.text_value, 'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY'), 'JDG', ' of ' || to_char(to_date(ti4.text_value, 'DD-MON-YYYY'),'DD fmMonth YYYY'), null)
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3, text_items ti4, item_details id4, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PROCESS_NOT_SERVED' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'APPLICATION_FOR' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti3.text_detail_code = id3.code and id3.domain = 'ORDER_DATE' and ti3.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti4.text_detail_code = id4.code and id4.domain = 'JUDGMENT_DATE' and ti4.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ
text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'JUDGMENT_AMOUNT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The amount of the judgment

AsIs.WhereClause: judgments jdg, case_events ce where ce.judg_seq = jdg.judg_seq and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The amount of the judgment

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'TOTAL_COSTS' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The costs awarded by the judge

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'TOTAL_COSTS' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The costs awarded by the judge

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Value supplied in response to the Local Number prompt
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'LOCAL_NUMBER' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Description of Process not served
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PROCESS_NOT_SERVED' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'PROC_NOT_SERVED_OTH' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Name of the process that has not been served. Choices are: APP(application), CLM (claim form), JDG (judgement), ORD (order), OTH (other), PART (particulars of claim)

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ENVELOPE_MARK' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Details of envelope marking. Choose from: GA (gone away), INSF (insufficient address), NK (not known at the address given), NOADD (no such address)

Values.Value: not known at the address given

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NAME' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: User Name

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'SECTION' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Users section

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'EXTENSION' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Users extension

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date by which the form must be completed
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'FORM_COMPLETE_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, 'SD', 'special directions are needed in this ' || vv2.description || ' to prepare for the final hearing which the judge would prefer to explain to you in person.','to consider whether the ' || vv2.description || ' can be disposed of because the ' || vv3.description || ' has no real prospect of success at a final hearing.')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, text_items ti3, item_details id3, valid_values vv2,valid_values vv3,case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PRELIM_HRG_REASON' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'CLM_CTRCLM_BOTH' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti3.text_detail_code = id3.code and id3.domain = 'CLM_DEFT' and ti3.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv2.vals_low_value = nvl(ti2.text_value, 'CLM') and vv2.vals_details_code = id2.code and vv3.vals_low_value = nvl(ti3.text_value, 'CLM') and vv3.vals_details_code= id3.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Reason for preliminary hearing. Choose from DIS (dispose of the case) and SD (judge has special directions for the case)

Values.Value: judge has special directions for the case

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_TIME' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Time of the hearing

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq= P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date of the hearing

AsIs.BriefDescription: Service address selected from user LOV
AsIs.SelectClause: decode (ti.text_value, 'ADDR', 'The defendant has given a new address for service of documents ', 'ACK', 'The acknowledgement was filed by the solicitors acting for the defendant who have given the following name and address for service of documents ' , null)
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service address line 1 selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service address line 2 selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service address line 3 selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service address line 4 selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service address line 5 selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service postcode selected from user LOV
AsIs.SelectClause: decode (ti.text_value, 'ADDR', addr. postcode,'ACK', def. solicitor_addr_5, null)
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: New Service Address

AsIs.BriefDescription: Prints text ‘ALL PARTIES HAVING AGREED’ on output to prompt ‘Have all parties agreed?’ when answered ‘Y’
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ALL_PARTIES_AGREED' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Have All parties agreed. Choose from Y or N

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DATE_STAYED_UNTIL' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date order stayed until

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date of action 14 days before expiry of stay
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'FD_AFTER_EXPIRY_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date 14 days after expiry of stay

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selects the wording required from a LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'WORDING_REQD' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Wording required for notice of hearing. Selection options (values): The hearing of the claimant’s application for (HRGC); The hearing of the defendant’s application for (HRGD)

Values.Value: The hearing of the claimant’s application for (HRGC)
The hearing of the defendant’s application for (HRGD)

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selects the details for what the application is for
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'APPLICATION_FOR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq= P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Application for what notice is for.
Name of other court where judgment was made

AsIs.BriefDescription: Value selected from LOV to associated prompt to indicate claimant, defendant or claimant and defendant.
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'CLM_DEFT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The Claimant or Defendant to file documents. Choose from: CLM (claimant), DEF (defendant), BTH (claimant and defendant)

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DOCUMENT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Details of document to be filed.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date by which documents should be filed
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DOCS_FILE_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date documents filed.

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The division, IIT Division (Chancery or Queen's Bench), derived from cm_general.f_division function using the casename as argument. This variable uses variable vdDistrictRegistry determine text output

Values.Value: In the High Court of Justice Queen's Bench Division
In the High Court of Justice Chancery Division

AsIs.WhereClause: personalise per, courts crt where crt.code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The name of the court. eg. Camberley, Telford, Basingstoke

AsIs.BriefDescription: Court Type (County Court or District Registry)
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: This variable used vdDistrictRegistry as test input to determine text output.

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The Claim's Number, case number, select case_number from case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.WhereClause: cases cas, case_events ce where cas.case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Name of the claimant party. Can have many claimants to a case. This is numbered by the vdClaimantId

AsIs.WhereClause: cases cas, case_events ce where cas.case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Reference of the party. Uses mainClaimantId as index to identify main claimant. If not provided, uses number.

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events ce, defendants def where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1)

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Name of the defendant party. Can have many defendants to a case. This is index by variabledata/claim/maindefendantid(mainDefendantId). If more than 1 defendant, uses vdNumberOfDefendants to determine extra text to be added to defendant name.

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events ce, defendants def, addresses addr where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Reference of the party. Uses mainDefendantId as index to identify main defendant. If not provided, uses number.

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The date the notice was issued.

AsIs.SelectClause: crt.name || ' COUNTY COURT' || decode(crt.district_registry, 'Y', ' AND DISTRICT REGISTRY')
AsIs.WhereClause: courts crt, personalise per where P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and per.crt_code = crt.code
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type='OFFICE'
personalise per, courts crt where crt.code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ
personalise per, courts crt where crt.code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Explanation that document has been returned to the Home Court if that is not this court
AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, null, null, 'The document has been returned to the Home Court and any further correspondence has been sent there.')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'LOCAL_NUMBER' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Indicates that the notice is from another court. Choose from Y or N. Default N

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The date the receipt was sent.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Claimants oral evidence entered at user prompt.
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DEFT_INTENTION' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Defendant Intention. Choose from: ALL (defend all of the claim), CTST (contest the court''s jurisdiction), PART (defend part of the claim)..

AsIs.BriefDescription: Users selection to the claimants oral evidence entered at user LOV.
AsIs.SelectClause: (ti.text_value, 'CTST', 'an application to contest the court''s jurisdiction', 'a defence')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DEFT_INTENTION' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Defendant Intention. Choose from: ALL (defend all of the claim), CTST (contest the court''s jurisdiction), PART (defend part of the claim)..

AsIs.BriefDescription: Defendant's Correct Name selected at user LOV.
AsIs.SelectClause: decode (ti.text_value, 'Y', 'The defendant''s name has been corrected to read ' || def.name, null)
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, defendants def,case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DEFT_NAME_CORRECTED' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and nvl(ce.deft_id,1) = def.id and def.case_number = ce.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Wether the defendant name was corrected. Choose from Y or N.

AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, null, null, '0', null, '(less #' || ti.text_value || ' which you have already paid)')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PAID_BEFORE_JUDGMENT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Amount paid before judgment. Depending on which event number is invoked, variable will be embedded with text.

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PAID_BEFORE_JUDGMENT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Amount paid before judgment. Depending on which event number is invoked, variable will be embedded with text.

Value.ExtraInfo: show varaible value with text ie. '(less £' + vdPaidBeforeJudgment + 'which you have already paid)'
show varaible value with text ie. '(less £' + vdPaidBeforeJudgment + 'which you have already paid)'
show varaible value with text ie. '(less £' + vdPaidBeforeJudgment + 'which you have already paid)'
show varaible value with text ie. '(less £' + vdPaidBeforeJudgment + 'which you have already paid)'
show varaible value with text ie. '(less £' + vdPaidBeforeJudgment + 'which you have already paid)'

AsIs.BriefDescription: Display version of the judgment date
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'JUDGMENT_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The date of the Judgment. date format dd-mmm-yyyy

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'JUDGMENT_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The date of the Judgment. date format dd-mmm-yyyy

AsIs.WhereClause: judgments jdg, case_events ce where ce.judg_seq = jdg.judg_seq and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The date of the Judgment. date format dd-mmm-yyyy

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'INSTALMENT_AMOUNT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Amount to pay per instalment. Numeric values

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'INSTALMENT_PERIOD' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'INSTALMENT_PERIOD' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = nvl(ti.text_value,'WK') and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Period between instalments. Choose from FW (forthwith) or FUL (by vdDeterminationPeriod)

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: First Instalment date. Date Format dd-mmm-yyyy

AsIs.BriefDescription: First payment date as stored to database (not displayed) i.e. in dd-mon-yyyy format.
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: First Instalment date

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date by which full payment is to have been received
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PAYMENT_IN_FULL_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Payment date for full payment. Date format dd-mmm-yyyy

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'REGISTERED_JDG' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Registered Judgment. Choose from Y or N

AsIs.SelectClause: rtrim(replace(decode(ti.text_value, null, null ,cm_general.superinitcap(ti.text_value) || ' ' || decode(rc.rv_iit_code_1, null, 'County Court', 'District Registry') || ', ' ||cm_general.superinitcap(ti1.text_value) || ', ' ||cm_general.superinitcap(ti2.text_value)), ',,', ','), ',')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti1, item_details id1,text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce, cases cas, ccbc_ref_codes rc where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_VENUE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti1.text_detail_code = id1.code and id1.domain = 'HRG_ADDR_1' and ti1.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'HRG_ADDR_2' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and cas.case_type = rc.rv_low_value(+) and rc.rv_domain(+) = 'CURRENT_CASE_TYPE'

AsIs.SelectClause: replace(decode(ti.text_value, null, null, decode(ti3.text_value, null,'',', ' ||cm_general.superinitcap(ti3.text_value))|| decode(ti4.text_value, null,'',', ' ||cm_general.superinitcap(ti4.text_value))|| decode(ti5.text_value, null,'',', ' ||ti5.text_value)), ',,', ',')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti3, item_details id3, text_items ti4, item_details id4, text_items ti5, item_details id5, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'HRG_VENUE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti3.text_detail_code = id3.code and id3.domain = 'HRG_ADDR_3' and ti3.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti4.text_detail_code = id4.code and id4.domain = 'HRG_ADDR_4' and ti4.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti5.text_detail_code = id5.code and id5.domain = 'HRG_POSTCODE' and ti5.text_case_number= ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Linked to Is hearing listed?

AsIs.BriefDescription: Outputs value selected from LOV or free text entered if OTH selected.
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce,valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DOCUMENT' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'DOCUMENT_OTHER' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The doccument service. choose from CF (CLAIM FORM), CFPC (CLAIM FORM AND PARTICULARS OF CLAIM), OTH (OTHER) and PC (PARTICULARS OF CLAIM).

Values.Value: CLAIM FORM AND PARTICULARS OF CLAIM

OTHER
variabledata/order/docserviceother The free text if OTH is chosen in vdDocumentService Q&A

AsIs.BriefDescription: The party (i.e. the Claimant, Defendant or some other party) service is being dispensed with
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce, valid_values vv where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'PARTY_SERV' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'PARTY_SERV_OTHER' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and vv.vals_low_value = ti.text_value and vv.vals_details_code = id.code

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The party service. choose from CLM (CLAIMANT) DEF (DEFENDANT) and OTH (OTHER)

Values.Value:
OTHER
variabledata/order/partyserviceother The freetext if OTH is chosen in vdPartyService Q&A

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Frequency of payment. If FW = Forthwith. If FUL = by vdDeterminationPeriod
The period of determination. Choose from MTH(Month) or WK (Week). Used by vdPaymentFrequency as input
The date the result was issued. date format dd-mmm-yyyy
The result of the judgment. Choose from GRANTED or DETERMINED
Interest to be included. Choose from Y or N
The period of determination. Choose from MTH(Month) or WK (Week). Used by vdPaymentFrequency as input

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text printed dependant on answer to prompt ‘Is the order made by Consent?’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: N/A

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Was order made by consent. Choose from Y or N

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date entered in response to ‘Date of agreement’ prompt in format ‘DD fmMONTH YYYY’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: TEXT_ITEMS where case_number = :global.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date of agreement

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text entered in response to prompt ‘Goods Detained (line 1)’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: TEXT_ITEMS Where case_number = :global.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: First line goods detained details

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text entered in response to prompt ‘Goods Detained (line 2)’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: TEXT_ITEMS Where case_number = :global.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: First line goods detained details

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date entered in response to ‘Date goods to be returned’ prompt in format ‘DD fmMONTH YYYY’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: TEXT_ITEMS Where case_number = :global.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Date where good are to be returned

AsIs.BriefDescription: Amount entered in response to prompt ‘Amount of unpaid balance’ formatted as money (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: TEXT_ITEMS Where case_number = :global.case_number

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Amount of unpaid balance

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text printed depending on answer to prompt ‘Hire Purchase Agreement’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.SelectClause: ‘regulated hire purchase agreement' if ‘Y’ ‘regulated conditional sale agreement’ otherwise
AsIs.WhereClause: N/A

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Hire purchase agreement. Choose from Y or N

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text printed dependant on answer to prompt ‘Is the matter certified fit for Counsel?’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.SelectClause: ‘Certified as Fit for Counsel' if ‘Y’ otherwise left blank
AsIs.WhereClause: N/A

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Matter is certified fit for counsel. Choose from Y or N

AsIs.WhereClause: judgments jdg, case_events ce where ce.judg_seq = jdg.judg_seq and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The judgment status, S (Satisfied), C (cancelled) or SA (set aside).

AsIs.SelectClause: decode(jdg.status, 'SET ASIDE', to_char(sysdate,'DD fmMonth YYYY'), to_char(jdg.date_of_final_payment,'DD fmMonth YYYY'))
AsIs.WhereClause: judgments jdg, case_events ce where ce.judg_seq = jdg.judg_seq and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Todays Date

AsIs.WhereClause: case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The division, IIT Division (Chancery or Queen's Bench), derived from cm_general.f_division function using the casename as argument. This variable is used as test input for vdCourtDivision to determine output text.
If exist variabledata/claim/mainclaimantid(mainClaimantId) then variabledata/claim/mainclaimantid else variabledata/claim/claimant/number(number). Used by vdClaimantName
ACK if the solicitor acknoledges notice and provides address or ADDR if the defendant provides an address.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Selected service name selected from user LOV
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce,cases cas,defendants def,addresses addr where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'NEW_SERVICE_ADDR' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and cas.case_number = ce.case_number and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = ce.deft_id and def.case_number = addr.deft_case_number and def.id = addr.deft_id and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and addr.addr_seq = (select max(addr_seq) from addresses addr2 where ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and def.case_number = ce.case_number and def.id = nvl(ce.deft_id,1) and def.case_number = addr2.deft_case_number and def.id = addr2.deft_id and addr2.valid_to is null and addr2.addr_type = 'SERVICE')

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The party to which the notice is served.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Text printed dependant on answer to prompt ‘Is the order made by Consent?’ (Not via document variables table)
AsIs.WhereClause: N/A

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Was order made by consent. Choose from Y or N
Used as index for variables vdClaimantReference to identify main claimant
This number is used to index the claimant or defendant
Used as index for variables vdDefendantName to identify main defendant

AsIs.SelectClause: replace(initcap(addr.addr_1) || ', ' || initcap(addr.addr_2) || decode(addr.addr_3, null, '', ', ' || initcap(addr.addr_3)) || decode(addr.addr_4, null, '', ', ' || initcap(addr.addr_4)) || decode(addr.addr_5, null, '', ', ' || initcap(addr.addr_5)) || decode(addr.postcode, null, '', ', ' || addr.postcode), ',,', ',')
AsIs.WhereClause: personalise per, addresses addr where addr.crt_code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ and addr.valid_to is null and addr.addr_type = 'OFFICE'

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The court address. Combines address line1,2,3,4 and 5 and postcode etc. into 1 varaiable.

AsIs.WhereClause: personalise per, courts crt where crt.code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ

Output.ExtraInfo: Used in all templated that have a footer.

AsIs.WhereClause: personalise per, courts crt where crt.code = per.crt_code and P_EVENT_SEQ = P_EVENT_SEQ
case_events where event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: This is a count on the defendants in xml data. Performs count(variabledata/claim/defendant). Used by vdDefendantName. Values 0 or more

AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'DEEMED_SERVICE_DATE' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.BriefDescription: Date defendant has until to reply
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events ce, defendants def where def.id = 1 and def.case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ
case_events ce, defendants def where def.id = 1 and def.case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT First line of def's address at time of judgment if not current
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

AsIs.BriefDescription: IIT Requires amending 'or valid_to is null'
AsIs.WhereClause: case_events e, amendments am, judgments j, addresses addr where e.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ and am.case_number = e.case_number and am.amend_seq = (select min(am2.amend_seq) from amendments am2 where am2.case_number = e.case_number and am2.case_number = am.case_number) and e.judg_seq = j.judg_seq and addr.deft_id = j.deft_id and addr.addr_seq = (select max(a1.addr_seq) from addresses a1 where a1.addr_type = 'SERVICE' and a1.deft_case_number = e.case_number and a1.deft_id = j.deft_id and ((TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_from,'DD-MON-YY')) <= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(a1.valid_to,'DD-MON-YY')) >= TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) or a1.valid_to is null)) or (TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(j.judgment_date,'DD-MON-YY')) TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(am.amend_date,'DD-MON-YY')) and a1.valid_to is null)))

ToBe.SummaryInfo: The address of the court giving the Judgment
The instigator of the application: CLM (Claimant), DEF (Defendant), OTH (Other)
The free text if OTH is chosen in vdDocumentService
The freetext if OTH is chosen in vdPartyService
Whether the claimant/defendant is the reason for cancelling the hearing. Choose from CLM (claimant) and DEFT (defendant).
Listed hearing. Choose from Y or N.

AsIs.BriefDescription: Reasons for allocation have been given
AsIs.SelectClause: decode(ti.text_value, 'NR', null, 'R', 'The reason the judge has given for allocation to this track is that ' || lower(ti2.text_value) ||'.', 'RS', 'The reasons the judge has given for allocation to this track are that ' || lower(ti2.text_value) ||'.')
AsIs.WhereClause: text_items ti, item_details id, text_items ti2, item_details id2, case_events ce where ti.text_detail_code = id.code and id.domain = 'ALLOC_REASON_GIVEN' and ti.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ti2.text_detail_code = id2.code and id2.domain = 'ALLOCATION_REASON' and ti2.text_case_number = ce.case_number and ce.event_seq = P_EVENT_SEQ

ToBe.SummaryInfo: Is allocation reason given. Y YES or N NO.
